DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PHI, PHAN LOAN DBA LESLIE'S NAILS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRENCH, TIMOTHY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PHI, PHAN LOAN DBA LESLIE'S NAILS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
